conflict: A family meal reopens unresolved division trauma while debt realities narrow Ina's options.
consequence: Ina stays in the operation but sets an internal red line against civilian harm.
must_land_beats: Quiet dinner conversation includes non-strategic memory and humor before conflict rises.
Dohyun admits Eun-sook believed stories could move people more than policy did.
Collection calls and unpaid bills make withdrawal materially costly.
Ina commits to continue and privately records a personal ethical rule.
objective: Decide whether to continue after initial recruitment.
